description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with two broad white horizontal stripes encircling its midsection, which are likely intended for high visibility. The surface shows some signs of wear, including scuff marks and slight discoloration, especially near the base. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The base appears to be made of a thicker, possibly weighted material to prevent tipping, and it has a slightly textured, grippy finish. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A tall orange traffic cone with two wide white stripes and a sturdy, square base, showing some wear and scuff marks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and a slightly worn, square base.
description_view_1: Similar to the front, this view highlights the evenness of the stripes and the base's texture.
description_view_2: This angle shows more pronounced wear on the base and clear visibility of the white stripes.
description_view_3: This view reveals subtle scuff marks and the rounded tip, with the stripes remaining prominent.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white stripes encircle the cone, positioned in the upper and middle sections. The stripes are of equal width and are likely reflective.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, wide, and appears thick and slightly textured, likely made of rubber for stability and grip. It shows visible wear and some discoloration.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with visible scuff marks and some fading, especially near the base.
